text.heading: DEPARTMENTAL POSTGRADUATE SEMINAR SERIES
text.p: On behalf of the Head, Department of English, Prof. X. X. and the Postgraduate Co-ordinator, Dr , I wish to inform you of the take off of the Department of English Postgraduate Seminar Series which have been scheduled to begin very soon.
We are proposing a tentative time of every other Thursday at 12pm as the time of the seminar. The first in the series will be as follows:
Topic: A CRITICAL DISCOURSE ANALYSIS OF NIGER DELTA ISSUES IN SELECTED NIGERIAN NEWSPAPERS AND MAGAZINES; 199 - 2007.

We count on you so much for the success of this seminar series and we are equally available to listen to any improvement you can suggest so make the exercise better.Your attendance and active participation will be highly appreciated. The paper is attached for your perusal.
